'''Perithal VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> in the [[Perithal system/Legends|Perithal system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was the location of a branch campus of the [[Institute of Starship Engineers]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Inner Rim map on page 19 of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places Perithal on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] at coordinates N-13.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
